memory.write: Save a memory about the user or your past conversations so you can recall it later — names, preferences, what came up, and anything worth remembering.
memory.read: Read a memory you saved earlier, by its exact location.
memory.search: Search your memories about the user and past conversations by keyword.
memory.browse: Look over the memories you have saved so far.
memory.link: Connect two memories so you can recall them together later.
memory.backlinks: Find which of your memories refer back to this one.
memory.delete: Forget a memory you no longer need to keep.

context.write: Write a record to the shared team context: key decisions, conventions, and direction the team relies on. Update it when direction changes.
context.read: Read a shared-context record by its exact location before you act on it.
context.search: Search the shared team context by keyword; read it before acting.
context.browse: Survey the shared team context so you know what the team already relies on.
context.link: Relate two shared-context records so the team can navigate between them.
context.backlinks: Find which shared-context records depend on this one.
context.delete: Remove a shared-context record that no longer reflects the team's direction.

knowledge.write: Add an entry to the team knowledge base: settled facts, conventions, and reference material that are established and intended to be durable.
knowledge.read: Read a knowledge-base entry by its exact location.
knowledge.search: Search the team knowledge base of settled facts and conventions by keyword.
knowledge.browse: Survey the team knowledge base of settled facts and conventions.
knowledge.link: Relate two knowledge-base entries so readers can navigate between them.
knowledge.backlinks: Find which knowledge-base entries reference this one.
knowledge.delete: Remove a knowledge-base entry that is no longer established or correct.

neutral.write: Write a record to the store.
neutral.read: Read a record from the store by its exact location.
neutral.backlinks: Find records that reference this one.
